title: Lab: Repair a Water-Delivery Request Checkout
summary: Lab: Repair a Water-Delivery Request Checkout retrieves prior skills in an original failed water-delivery validation and status recovery scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply accessible names descriptions, accessible errors status in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real failed water-delivery validation and status recovery artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
